subtopics: Need for measurement; Units of measurement; Systems of units
key_concepts: SI units, fundamental and derived units
Significant figures
Determining the uncertainty in result
Dimensions of physical quantities
Dimensional analysis and its applications

subtopics: Frame of reference; Motion in a straight line
key_concepts: Elementary concepts of differentiation and integration for describing motion
Uniform and non-uniform motion
Average speed, average velocity, instantaneous velocity
Uniformly accelerated motion
Velocity-time and position-time graphs; Relations for uniformly accelerated motion

subtopics: Scalar and vector quantities; Position and displacement vectors
key_concepts: General vectors, equality of vectors, multiplication by real number
Addition and subtraction of vectors, Unit vector
Resolution of a vector in plane, rectangular components
Scalar and Vector product of vectors
Motion in a plane: Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion

subtopics: Intuitive concept of force; Inertia
key_concepts: Newton's first law, momentum and second law, impulse
Newton's third law
Law of conservation of linear momentum and its applications
Equilibrium of concurrent forces
Static and kinetic friction; Rolling friction

subtopics: Work done by constant force; Work done by variable force
key_concepts: Kinetic energy, work-energy theorem, power
Notion of potential energy, potential energy of a spring
Conservative and non-conservative forces
Motion in a vertical circle; Elastic and inelastic collisions

units.unit_name: Motion of System of Particles and Rigid Body
explicit_chapters: System of Particles and Rotational Motion

chapters.chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_heading: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Centre of mass; Momentum conservation
key_concepts: Moment of force, torque, angular momentum
Law of conservation of angular momentum and its applications
Equilibrium of rigid bodies; Rigid body rotation equations
Comparison of linear and rotational motions
Moment of inertia, radius of gyration

subtopics: Kepler's laws of planetary motion; Universal law of gravitation
key_concepts: Acceleration due to gravity and its variation with altitude/depth
Gravitational potential energy and gravitational potential
Escape speed, orbital velocity of a satellite
Energy of an orbiting satellite

subtopics: Elasticity; Stress-strain relationship
key_concepts: Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, bulk modulus
Shear modulus of rigidity (qualitative)
Poisson's ratio; Elastic energy
Application of elastic behavior of materials (qualitative)

subtopics: Pressure due to fluid column; Pascal's law
key_concepts: Viscosity, Stokes' law, terminal velocity
Streamline and turbulent flow, critical velocity
Bernoulli's theorem (Torricelli's law, Dynamic lift)
Surface energy, surface tension, angle of contact
Excess pressure across curved surface; Drops, bubbles, capillary rise

subtopics: Heat, temperature; Thermal expansion (solids, liquids, gases)
key_concepts: Anomalous expansion of water; Specific heat capacity (Cp, Cv)
Calorimetry; Change of state - latent heat
Heat transfer: Conduction, convection, radiation
Thermal conductivity; Blackbody radiation concepts
Wein's displacement Law, Stefan's law

subtopics: Thermal equilibrium; Zeroth law of thermodynamics
key_concepts: Heat, work and internal energy
First law of thermodynamics
Second law of thermodynamics: State variables and equation of state
Change of gaseous state conditions (isothermal, adiabatic)
Reversible, irreversible, and cyclic processes

units.unit_name: Behaviour of Perfect Gases and Kinetic Theory of Gases

subtopics: Equation of state of a perfect gas; Work done in compressing a gas
key_concepts: Kinetic theory assumptions, concept of pressure
Kinetic interpretation of temperature; RMS speed
Degrees of freedom; Law of equi-partition of energy (statement)
Application to specific heat capacities of gases
Mean free path; Avogadro's number

subtopics: Periodic motion; Time period, frequency
key_concepts: Displacement as a function of time; Periodic functions
Simple harmonic motion (S.H.M)
Uniform circular motion and its equations

subtopics: Periodic motion concepts applied to waves
key_concepts: Wave properties and behavior (implied from Oscillations context)

subtopics: Conservation of charge
Coulomb's law and superposition principle
Continuous charge distribution
key_concepts: Electric field due to point charge
Electric dipole and torque in uniform electric field
Gauss's theorem applications (wire, plane sheet, spherical shell)

subtopics: Electric potential and equipotential surfaces
Potential energy of charge systems
key_concepts: Conductors, insulators, dielectrics, and polarization
Capacitors: series/parallel combinations and parallel plate capacitor with dielectric
Energy stored in a capacitor (formulae only)

subtopics: Drift velocity, mobility, and Ohm's law
key_concepts: Electrical resistivity, conductivity, and temperature dependence of resistance
Internal resistance, EMF, and combination of cells
Kirchhoff's rules and Wheatstone bridge

units.unit_name: Unit-III Magnetic Effects of Current and Magnetism

subtopics: Magnetic field concepts: Oersted's experiment, Biot-Savart law
key_concepts: Ampere's law applications (straight wire)
Force on moving charges and current-carrying conductors
Current loop as magnetic dipole; Moving coil galvanometer

subtopics: Bar magnet as an equivalent solenoid
key_concepts: Properties of magnetic materials (qualitative)

units.unit_name: Unit-IV Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents

key_concepts: Principles of electromagnetic induction
Fundamentals of alternating currents
Nature and properties of electromagnetic waves
Reflection, refraction, and optical instruments
Interference, diffraction, and polarization

key_concepts: Photoelectric effect and wave nature of matter
